items.name_en: ❤️ Pure original checkered canvas two-tone patchwork lock bag from Brand B. The canvas material has a fresh and elegant vibe. The bag is structured and holds its shape without being soft or wrinkly. It is made using selected jacquard fine-woven canvas and leather, finished with exquisite heavy-duty visible stitching. The hardware is pure copper plated with real gold. The TB logo is truly beautiful, using the classic B-shaped lock as decoration—simple, elegant, and recognizable. The lining is full cowhide with two compartments and a zipper pocket. The capacity is huge and super spacious, enough to hold daily essentials. The adjustable calfskin shoulder strap is stylish for both shoulder and crossbody wear. It is a very trendy British retro style. This material is generally lighter than leather bags. The canvas is also lightweight, durable, and has a top-notch texture. It is a low-key luxury with substance, and you can wear it all year round. It goes with absolutely any outfit! Love it!

items.name_en: Genuine factory-made, ZP-grade, authentic quality. We ensure all materials, hardware, stitching, and edges use 100% authentic raw materials.
items.name_cn:
Genuine factory-made, ZP-grade, authentic quality. We ensure all materials, hardware, stitching, and edges use 100% authentic raw materials.
Hermes Birkin 25cm Gold Brown Gold Hardware
Exclusive Birkin channel goods, exclusive European factory leather and hardware assembled ZP surplus stock
Size: 20 X 25 X 13CM
We use imported factory Togo genuine leather. What is Togo leather?
Togo leather: The most classic Birkin leather. The surface has an even grain, similar to grainy leather, with a luster. The leather is relatively stiff, easy to maintain the bag's shape, relatively light, feels soft to the touch, and is wear-resistant and durable;
We use pure original, factory leather that is the same as the authentic counter version!

items.name_en: Genuine factory-made, ZP-grade authentic quality. We ensure all materials, hardware, stitching, and edges use 100% authentic raw materials.
items.name_cn:
Genuine factory-made, ZP-grade authentic quality. We ensure all materials, hardware, stitching, and edges use 100% authentic raw materials.
HERMES Evelyne 16 Black Silver Clasp
Taurillon Maurice Calfskin Shoulder Crossbody Mini Unisex Couple Style
Exclusive channel goods, exclusive ZP factory material assembled goods, the ceiling of H.
Size: 16*18*5cm
Hermès Evelyne
The design inspiration for the Evelyne bag comes from a type of saddlebag called a 'saddle bag,' which is commonly used by riders and coachmen to store and transport harnesses and other necessities.
Hermès combines the classic elements of this saddlebag with the brand's craftsmanship tradition to create a bag that is both stylish and functional.
Therefore, the Evelyne bag is not only a practical handbag but also represents the brand's deep history and cultural traditions.
It conveys Hermès' love and respect for equestrian sports, as well as its pursuit of high quality, refinement, and elegance.

items.name_en: H-Hermès Steeple 🌈
items.name_cn:
H-Hermès Steeple 🌈
Style:『Tote Shopping Bag』
The soulful shape crafted by the artisan's hand is a signature style you'll remember at first glance❤️‍🔥
A people-oriented philosophy dedicated to environmental protection, featuring natural imported canvas material. Stylish and practical~ You have to get one~ Various pattern designs!
Rest assured, you won't be overwhelmed by the choices. Each piece is a boutique, each unique~
Size: 28, 28.5, 17cm
